landing.heroTitle: Tarot Readings That Tell Your Story
landing.heroSubtitle: Not generic card meanings — a narrative woven from your entire spread. AI-powered readings with real conversational depth.
landing.step1Desc: Single card for quick insight, three-card for past-present-future, or Celtic Cross for deep exploration.
landing.step2Desc: Cards are shuffled using cryptographic randomness — verifiable, fair, and truly random.
landing.step3Desc: AI reads all cards together as one narrative. Ask follow-up questions to go deeper.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you want deeper readings.
landing.waitlistSubtitle: Be the first to know when we launch.
landing.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! We'll be in touch.

reading.drawCards: Focus your energy and draw your cards
reading.tapToReveal: Tap each card to reveal it
reading.upgradeFollowUp: Follow-up questions are available with Pro.
reading.limitReached: You've used all your follow-up questions for this reading.
